cases.description: Validate Preview2 FLOW_UPDATE metadata semantics, including scope, flags, retry-after, and framed-message round-trip behavior.
Validate Preview2 RESULT_HINT metadata semantics and reject malformed reason codes or invalid fixed-width payloads.
Round-trip CACHE_PUT, CACHE_ACK, and CACHE_INVALIDATE semantics for reusable Preview2 low-frequency objects.
Validate Preview2 transport-probe control metadata before transport auto-selection enters smoke-level interop coverage.
